title: Swan's Law
description: Discouraging strip-mining in a new way! Inspired by YUNG's Law
body:
### **Swan's Law** is a mod that removes ores that are not next to caves.
Inspired by [YUNG's Law](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/yungs-law). ##### Anyone is free to contribute on the GitHub repository: [SwanX1/Swans-Law](https://github.com/SwanX1/Swans-Law)
